tagline: Earlier Lean theorem-proving model combining proof-step and whole-proof generation.
metaDescription: DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 (DeepSeek), released 2024-08 — part of the DeepSeek Prover line. Earlier Lean theorem-proving model combining proof-step and whole-proof g…
overview: DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 is a large language model from DeepSeek, part of the DeepSeek Prover line. Released 2024-08. Formal theorem-proving line for the Lean proof assistant, using RL with subgoal decomposition.
What's notable in this version: Earlier Lean theorem-proving model combining proof-step and whole-proof generation.
